to: make a section 8 order with respect to the child

conditions.text: a question arises with respect to the welfare of any child

an application for the order has been made by a person who is entitled to apply for a section 8 order with respect to the child; or has obtained the leave of the court to make the application; or the court considers that the order should be made even though no such application has been made

to: make a section 8 order with respect to any child

conditions.text: on the application of a person who is entitled to apply for a section 8 order with respect to the child; or has obtained the leave of the court to make the application

to: consider the restrictions imposed by section 9

for: any parent, guardian or special guardian of the child
to: be entitled to apply to the court for any section 8 order with respect to a child

for: any person who has parental responsibility for the child
to: be entitled to apply for a child arrangements order with respect to a child

conditions.text: in any case where a child arrangements order in force with respect to the child regulates arrangements relating to with whom the child is to live or when the child is to live with any person
has the consent of each of the persons named in the order as a person with whom the child is to live

to: be entitled to apply for a child arrangements order with respect to a child

conditions.text: the child has lived with him for a period of at least one year immediately preceding the application

to: be entitled to apply for a child arrangements order with respect to the child

conditions.text: the child has lived with the relative for a period of at least one year immediately preceding the application

for: any person who would not otherwise be entitled to apply for the variation or discharge of a section 8 order

conditions.text: the order was made on his application
in the case of a child arrangements order, he is named in provisions of the order regulating arrangements relating to with whom the child concerned is to spend time or otherwise have contact

to: have particular regard to certain factors when deciding whether or not to grant leave

conditions.text: the person applying for leave to make an application for a section 8 order is not the child concerned

to: grant leave if it is satisfied that the child concerned has sufficient understanding to make the proposed application for the section 8 order

conditions.text: the person applying for leave to make an application for a section 8 order is the child concerned
